title: Cross-engine contract test (Gemini/Antigravity)
description: From the Gemini side, follow gemini.md + ORCHESTRATION.md end to end AS gemini-runner: read the blackboard, claim this task, acquire a lock, write .harness/logs/gemini_contract_report.md (protocol checklist + 3 harness frictions from the Gemini perspective + proposed fixes), put a ReContext extract into .harness/recontext_evidence.md, hand off to verifier. Prompt handed over in 'prompts para Gemini/1.md'. Purpose: prove NLAH portability and break cognitive monoculture.
acceptance_criteria: events.jsonl shows gemini-runner claim -> in_progress -> handoff
no live lock left behind by gemini-runner
friction notes usable as input for T-006
